key_points.text: Strong profitability with net income of $58.3 billion in Q1 FY2027, more than triple the $18.8 billion in Q1 FY2026, demonstrating exceptional year-over-year earnings growth.
Robust cash generation with operating cash flow of $50.3 billion in Q1 FY2027 compared to $27.4 billion in Q1 FY2026, up 84% year-over-year.

citation.quote: Net cash provided by operating activities 50,344 ... 27,414

key_points.text: Significant shareholder capital return with $20.2 billion in share repurchases in Q1 FY2027 versus $14.5 billion in Q1 FY2026, and board approval of an additional $80 billion repurchase authorization without expiration on May 18, 2026.

citation.quote: We repurchased 108 million and 126 million shares of our common stock for $ 20.2 billion and $ 14.5 billion during the first quarter of fiscal years 2027 and 2026, respectively. As of April 26, 2026, we were authorized, subject to certain specifications, to repurchase up to $ 38.5 billion of our common stock. On May 18, 2026, our Board of Directors approved an additional $ 80.0 billion in share repurchase authorization, without expiration.

key_points.text: Substantial dividend increase with quarterly dividend raised from $0.01 to $0.25 per share effective June 4, 2026, signaling confidence in cash generation and capital structure.

citation.quote: On May 18, 2026, we increased our quarterly cash dividend from $ 0.01 per share to $ 0.25 per share to all shareholders of record on June 4, 2026.

key_points.text: Strong balance sheet with total shareholders' equity of $195.5 billion as of April 26, 2026, up from $157.3 billion as of January 25, 2026, with total assets growing to $259.5 billion.

citation.quote: Total shareholders' equity 195,474 ... 157,293 ... Total liabilities and shareholders' equity $ 259,474 ... $ 206,803

key_points.text: Full-year FY2026 net income of $120.1 billion, up from $72.9 billion in FY2025, demonstrating sustained acceleration in profitability.

Leading AI infrastructure platform with data-center-scale Blackwell architecture offerings featuring holistic co-design of chips, networking, systems, software, and algorithms to maximize AI performance and scale.

citation.quote: Introduced with the Blackwell architecture, our data-center-scale offerings feature extreme co-design where the infrastructure's chips, networking, systems, software, and algorithms are holistically architected and optimized to maximize performance and scale.
